description: This lesson focuses on essential cooking techniques such as chopping, sautéing, and boiling. Users will learn through interactive tasks and quizzes to reinforce their skills.
objectives: Understand basic knife skills and safety.
Learn how to sauté vegetables properly.
Master the technique of boiling water and cooking pasta.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients and tools: knife, cutting board, vegetables, and a pot of water.
Heat the pan and add oil, then sauté the chopped vegetables.
Boil water in a pot and add salt before cooking pasta.

quizzes.question: What is the safest way to hold a knife?
